历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13368 → 19572 → 20513 → 28137 → 25742, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted backward to 28137, then slightly recovered to 25742 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 25742. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui for Physics Category was 25 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 25 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with a stable ranking in the 75–80 range in recent years, placing it at the mid-to-upper level nationally. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with a Douyin popularity ranking of 70th (average). There are no obvious negative public opinions or abnormal admission records, so the application psychology is stable. Psychology is rated A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, and Physical Education A-. Among these, Psychology is the university's flagship discipline, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors shows a differentiated and wait-and-see trend, with a slight cooling in 2024 compared to 2023. Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, which is somewhat related to the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Physics, Optoelectronics, Materials, etc.). The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui general college entrance examination is approximately 451,000, with an estimated 315,700 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 70%, slightly fewer than the 320,779 in 2025, leading to a slight decrease in competition pressure. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score line is 461, slightly lower than the 2024 score of 465, remaining stable overall. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and recruits across provinces, with an enrollment scale of about 25 in Anhui, accounting for a small proportion. Guangdong, as an economically developed region, has some regional appeal to Anhui candidates, but it is not a decisive factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, based on the 2025 baseline of 25742, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26042, with a range of 25542–26542.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 25542–26542, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Optoelectronic Information, Applied Statistics, and other popular engineering majors) as the main direction. Tier 1 majors (Physics Teacher Training, Applied Psychology) can be used as a sprint choice, and Tier 3 majors (Materials Chemistry, Environmental Science, Tourism Management) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
